headline: PTC’s Army PLM Win And Free Startup Tools Reshape Growth Story
summary: PTC (NasdaqGS:PTC) has been selected by the U.S. Army as its official Product Data Management and Product Lifecycle Management platform, centered on the Windchill solution. The company also announced a global expansion of its startup program, offering its professional product development tools at no cost to qualified startups worldwide. PTC focuses on software for product development, lifecycle management and industrial applications. This places it directly in the path of digital product...
